title: Fix stdio.transport.ts: add max-buffer cap and proper parser
description: src/mcp/transports/stdio.transport.ts:144-208: custom brace-counting parser is not newline-safe, no max-buffer guard, doesn't respect brackets. DoS vector. Fix: use readline-based approach (utils/stdio-transport.ts already exists, or use split2). Cap buffer at 1MB; reset on overflow with error response. Make setupInputHandling idempotent.
validation: Send a 2MB incomplete JSON frame, confirm server rejects with error and resets. Send proper newline-delimited JSON, confirm it works.
